prose.overview: Rajpruek Club is Bangkok's most exclusive private golf venue — a members-only 18-hole course designed by J. Michael Poellot (former VP and Director at Robert Trent Jones II Group) that opened in 1994 on the Vibhavadi-Rangsit Road in Laksi, just 5.6 km from Don Mueang Airport. The course has been likened by enthusiasts to Augusta National for its aesthetic quality, and Top 100 Golf Courses ranked it among Asia's most spectacular layouts. It is a strictly private club: visitors may only play if hosted by a member, so green fees are not publicly listed. The address — 100 Moo 3, Vibhavadi-Rangsit Road — puts it squarely in northern Bangkok, making it one of the most centrally located private clubs in the city. The slope rating of 132 signals genuine difficulty.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole par-72 layout plays 6,565 yards from the blue tees across undulating parkland, an unusual topographic quality for Bangkok's predominantly flat terrain. Poellot's design features ponds and tree-lined corridors on a course rated 71.7/132 from the tips — the high slope number reflects the technical demands placed on shot-making accuracy. More than half the holes incorporate water hazards, and the artfully sculpted bunkers require precise approaches throughout. The greens are considered among Bangkok's best, fast and demanding. The course maintains exceptional conditioning year-round, reflecting the private club's willingness to invest in quality over quantity of rounds.
prose.tips: Access is by member invitation only — there is no public booking. If a Thai business contact or hotel concierge can arrange a member introduction, this is one of Bangkok's most rewarding playing experiences. Green fees, caddie fees, and cart fees are set privately and not publicly disclosed. The club operates a strict dress code and equipment standards. For members and their guests, the on-site driving range, professional instruction, spa, and restaurant make Rajpruek a full day out. Given the difficulty of access, most visiting golfers will encounter Rajpruek only once — make it count.
prose.location_and_access: Rajpruek Club is at 100 Moo 3, Vibhavadi-Rangsit Road, Tungsonghong, Laksi, Bangkok 10210 — in the Laksi district of northern Bangkok, roughly 5.6 km from Don Mueang International Airport and about 15–20 km from central Bangkok. Access via Vibhavadi-Rangsit Road or the Don Mueang Tollway is straightforward. The location in northern Bangkok makes it convenient for golfers arriving or departing via Don Mueang. Private car or taxi is standard; no meaningful public transport serves the immediate area.
prose.rental_cta_context: Rajpruek's exclusive private setting calls for equipment that matches the occasion. If you are lucky enough to secure a member guest round, LENGOLF can deliver top-tier rental clubs to your Bangkok hotel so you arrive at the first tee fully equipped and properly prepared.
